radius.$description: Border radius of the focus highlight around the pill clear button.

_.$description: Filter pill background color (default, no selection).

hover.$description: Filter pill background color on hover and focus (default, no selection).

_.$description: Filter pill background color when a selection is applied.

hover.$description: Filter pill background color on hover and focus when a selection is applied.

_.$description: Filter pill border color (default, no selection).

hover.$description: Filter pill border color on hover and focus.

selected.$description: Filter pill border color when a selection is applied.

_.$description: Filter pill text color (default, no selection).
Filter pill text color when a selection is applied.

hover.$description: Filter pill text color on hover and focus when a selection is applied.

text.$description: Filter selector empty (no filters found) message text color.
